title: ilex formosae
intro: Ilex formosae, also known as Taiwan holly, is a species of flowering plant in the family Aquifoliaceae. The plant is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and antimicrobial activities. The health benefits of Ilex formosae include reducing inflammation, improving cardiovascular health, and enhancing cognitive function. The plant is often prepared as a tea or capsule, and also used in traditional herbal remedies, such as infusions and decoctions.
